title: Automatic Magnetic Stirring Coffee Mug, Self Stirring, Novelty High Speed Mixing Cup with Lid, for Coffee Milk Tea, Beverages, Home, Office, School, Camping, Yoga, Travel, (Rechargeable-Rose Red)
description:
About this item
Powerful magnetic stirring and cooling function: The magnetic coffee stirring cup provides rapid cooling function, advanced cooling technology, quickly reducing the temperature of the beverage from 85 ° C to 55 ° C, making the beverage taste better. One click automatic mixing design, built-in magnetic mixer, easily mix beverages, coffee, and milk within 30 seconds, bringing you wonderful flavors.
There are two styles of USB charging and battery: there are USB charging and battery styles to choose from. The charging version is equipped with a powerful 500mAh battery, which can be used multiple times on a single charge, meeting the needs of a busy lifestyle. One click operation is simple, press the button to start mixing, press the button again to stop, without the need for complex operations.
Cold insulation, thermal insulation, comfort, and multifunctionality: The magnetic automatic stirring coffee cup adopts a high-quality double-layer 304 stainless steel vacuum inner insulation design inside, which can provide long-lasting insulation and cold insulation; The exterior is made of high-quality ABS material, which is resistant to falling and easy to clean. The streamlined design of the cup handle brings a more comfortable grip, making it more comfortable and safe to use.
Durable, healthy, hygienic, and portable: The electric high-speed mixing cup is made of sturdy and durable food grade 304 stainless steel inner liner and BPA free plastic cup lid. The mixing cup is compact in size, easy to carry, and suitable for all occasions, whether at home, office, travel, or camping; Suitable for busy professionals, students, coffee enthusiasts, and others who need to enjoy hot or cold drinks anytime, anywhere. It can also be given as a gift to family and friends.
Easy to clean and maintain: The cooling function of the high-speed mixer's mixing components is detachable, making it easy to clean automatically and manually separately, ensuring thorough cleaning for greater hygiene and health. The electric coffee mixing cup is made of high-quality ABS material, which is easy to rinse with water and can be quickly and easily cleaned.
